since_last: 64% of 89 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +5.44%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 64% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.06% · BTC +1.88% · Gold +2.07% · Nasdaq100 -0.98%. 64% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +5.44%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +5.44%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.70%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: META is the standout at +11.38%
cards.body: Leaders: META +11.38%, CRWD +10.30%, APP +9.94%, PLTR +9.04%, SNAP +8.22%. Laggards: TER -9.86%, KLAC -8.94%, LRCX -8.63%, MU -8.34%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.89% at $160.79
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.89% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
